anis-star.name: Anis: Star

findings: REFERENCE-GRADE holds: zero drift on My-Own-Star side (all values exact, triggers correct). Findings all hasB1-gated (cannot move sole-B1 comps): dropped Everyone's-Star heal (F1 crown consumer) + DEF (F2) + Max-HP grant (F3 HP-scaler consumer). Backfilled empty unmodeled

anis-star.evidence: Solo gauge recording — standard-launcher row confirmed (A25/A3); run A 0.94

skill1: If there are no other Burst 1 allies: Effect 1: Affects self. Cancels Everyone's Star.
If there are any other Burst 1 allies: Effect 1: Affects self. Cancels My Own Star.
skill2:
■ Activates when performing a Full Charge attack while in Everyone's Star status. Affects all allies.
Restores 1.26% of the skill user's final Max HP as HP.

records.comp: PI2 misc B3s RERUN w/ video (boss Water)
